productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Reversible Navy Blue Jacket
description: Composition Blue, white and maroon reversible padded vest made of 100% polyester, has a padded shell, mock collar with a full front zipper, quilted look, zippered pockets on one side, insert pockets on the other side and appliquéd branding on the left chest on both sides Fit Regular Wash Care Dry clean only For a look that's ready to face the great outdoors, this reversible padded vest from US Polo brings performance wear into the 21st century in style. Layer it over a plaid shirt and vintage denim for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
